specifications.name: Display refresh rate
specifications.value: 60 to 120 Hz (default set to 60 Hz; can enable smooth display to use 120 Hz)

specifications.name: Display variable refresh rate
specifications.value: Does not support 1 Hz; regular model limited to 60-120 Hz

specifications.name: Video (front)
specifications.value: 4K 30 fps with speech enhancement on; 4K 60 fps available if speech enhancement off

specifications.name: Video features
specifications.value: Blur video (rear only) to enhance bokeh; up to 20x digital zoom (practical use recommended up to ~11-12x)

specifications.name: Battery life / Screen-on-time
specifications.value: Examples: 7 hrs 8 mins SOT in one test; up to ~9 hrs on Wi‑Fi; realistic 6 to ~8.5-9 hrs

specifications.name: Wireless charging
specifications.value: Magnetic wireless charging supported; wirelessly charges at 15 W with magnetic (MagSafe-like / Qi2) accessories

specifications.name: SIM
specifications.value: India: single physical SIM; second SIM via eSIM

specifications.name: Back material / finish
specifications.value: Back uses Gorilla Glass Victus; matte glass finish that does not attract fingerprints

specifications.name: Speakers
specifications.value: Louder and clearer speakers compared to previous Pixel

specifications.name: Thermals
specifications.value: Runs warmer on active use/mobile data but heating much less than Pixel 9 series

specifications.name: Network / 5G speeds (tests)
specifications.value: Outskirts: ~262 Mbps download, ~56 Mbps upload; City: ~671 Mbps download, 86.8 Mbps upload (tested with AEL SIM in Hyderabad)

notable_features: Closes the gap between regular Pixel and Pro series in build quality and features
Now includes a 5x optical telephoto on the regular model (previously limited to Pro)
Improved video stabilization and reduced color shift when switching lenses vs earlier Pixels
Good overall camera performance; portrait blur can be hit-or-miss on fine edges/hair
Smooth software experience with no major lag observed
Magnetic accessory support (MagSafe-like) added to the Pixel lineup
products.availability: India variant starts at 256 GB with UFS storage; US base variant mentioned as 128 GB (not UFS4). Single physical SIM in India with eSIM for second slot.

the good thing is that this can also go to 120 Hz refresh rate ... this one just 60 to 120 Hz

the main camera is still a 48 MP which has optical image stabilization
The new addition is a ... 10.8 MP 5x zoom camera ... the ultra wide is now a 13 MP ... front camera ... 10.5 MP

it has magnets over here. So it does support that chi charging ... wirelessly will charge at 15 W
this is having a 4,970 mia battery

ultrasonic fingerprint scanner
solid build quality ... back is also Gorilla Glass Victors ... this one is having that matte glass that does not attract fingerprints

heating is a lot less compared to the Pixel 9 series

inside the box ... the phone itself and just this charging cable

specifications.name: Bezels
specifications.value: Slightly lesser bezels compared to regular Pixel 10

specifications.name: Display variable refresh rate
specifications.value: Proper variable refresh rate: can move from 1 Hz to 120 Hz

notable_features: Has a proper variable refresh rate down to 1 Hz which helps battery life (contrasted with regular Pixel 10's 60-120 Hz)
evidence: this is the bigger Pixel what do you say 10 Pro XL having a far bigger size
the Pro uh has slightly lesser bezels
the Pro has proper variable refresh rate. It can move from 1 Hz to 120
